name: Teddys Volcanic Voyage
short_description: Welcome to Teddy's Volcanic Voyage. A race to stay ahead of the coming flood. Run, jump, and soar your way through this unstable dark underground world. Collect volcanic salmon and magical artifacts to power your journey. Can you outrun the water, or will Teddy's voyage end before it ever began?
detailed_description:
A race to stay ahead of a coming flood, Teddy's Volcanic Voyage is a precision platformer emphasizing control and real time decision making. Choose your path as you run, jump, and soar your way through this dark underground world. Collect volcanic salmon and magical artifacts to power your journey. Featuring randomized world generation and hand drawn pixel art, this retro style game will keep you on your toes as you strive to reach new heights.

Cover Art by Alejandro C @thekickestudio

Art by Gerezek @germanio

Music by KVNE

Sound Design by Mihu @hzsmith
